title: Driver logs in and is routed to driver dashboard
description: Verifies that a driver can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the driver dashboard with a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the user lands on the driver dashboard

title: Admin logs in and is routed to admin dashboard
description: Verifies that an admin can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the admin dashboard with a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the user lands on the admin dashboard

title: Admin can run the core queue operation loop (load first then complete loading)
description: Verifies an admin can move the first queued driver into loading and then complete loading, and the queue state updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the tab for queue management
Click the action to load the first driver in the queue
Click the action to complete loading
Verify the queue view shows no driver currently in loading

title: Driver queue position updates while waiting
description: Verifies that after joining the queue, the driver dashboard updates the queue position over time without requiring navigation away from the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the action to pay the daily park fee
Click the action to join the live queue
Wait for queue position to update
Verify the queue position display changes to reflect an update

title: Driver can pay daily park fee and then join the live queue
description: Verifies that an authenticated driver can record the daily payment, see payment status update, join the queue, and then see a queue participation or position state displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the action to pay the daily park fee
Click the action to join the live queue
Verify the daily payment status is shown as paid for today
Verify the driver is shown as being in the queue or has a queue position displayed

title: Register a new driver with valid details and passport photo
description: Verifies that a new driver can submit the registration form with all required details and a valid passport photo and then receives success feedback and is routed to login or prompted to await approval.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the full name field with Test Driver One
Fill in the phone number field with 08011112222
Fill in the email field with testdriver1@example.com
Fill in the password field with TestPassword123!
Fill in the licence number field with LIC-12345
Fill in the plate number field with KKE-1234
Upload a valid image file as the passport photo
Submit the registration form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the user is routed to the login page or shown an await-approval post-submit state

title: Admin can review and approve a pending driver and see lists update
description: Verifies an admin can open a pending driver record, approve it, and the UI updates by removing it from pending and showing it in the drivers list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the tab for pending approvals
Open the details view for the first pending driver in the list
Approve the pending driver
Click the tab for drivers
Verify the drivers list is displayed and includes the newly approved driver record

title: Cooldown prevents joining the queue from driver dashboard
description: Verifies that when the dashboard indicates the driver is in cooldown, attempting to join the queue is blocked with a disabled action or an explanatory message.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the driver dashboard to display cooldown status
Attempt to join the live queue
Verify joining the queue is blocked by a disabled action or a cooldown message

title: Admin can review and reject a pending driver and see pending list update
description: Verifies an admin can reject a pending driver from its details view and the pending list updates to remove that driver.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the tab for pending approvals
Open the details view for the first pending driver in the list
Reject the pending driver
Verify the pending approvals list no longer shows the rejected driver

title: Driver sees profile details and passport photo on dashboard
description: Verifies that after logging in, the driver dashboard displays the driver profile details along with a visible passport photo.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify driver profile details are displayed
Verify the driver passport photo is displayed

title: Admin can switch between queue, pending approvals, and drivers tabs and see each list
description: Verifies the admin can navigate between the main admin tabs and each section renders its corresponding list content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the tab for queue management
Click the tab for pending approvals
Click the tab for drivers
Verify the drivers list is displayed

title: Driver can log out and returns to login page
description: Verifies that a logged-in driver can log out and is returned to the login page with the session ended.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the logout control
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Admin can view a registered driver record details from the drivers tab
description: Verifies the admin can open a driver record from the drivers list and see the driver details view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the tab for drivers
Open the details view for the first driver in the list
Verify driver profile details are displayed

title: Admin can logout and return to login screen
description: Verifies the admin can end the session from the admin dashboard and the app returns to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the logout control
Verify the login page is displayed

title: Invalid credentials show an error and user remains logged out
description: Verifies that logging in with invalid credentials shows an error confirmation and does not route the user into a protected dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone number field with 08000000000
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify an error confirmation is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Registration blocks submission when required vehicle fields are missing
description: Verifies that omitting required vehicle details prevents registration submission and shows inline validation for missing fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the full name field with Test Driver Two
Fill in the phone number field with 08022223333
Fill in the password field with TestPassword123!
Upload a valid image file as the passport photo
Submit the registration form
Verify inline validation errors are displayed for the missing required fields

title: Registration rejects an unsupported passport photo file
description: Verifies that uploading an unsupported or invalid passport photo shows an inline validation message and prevents successful registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the full name field with Test Driver Three
Fill in the phone number field with 08033334444
Fill in the email field with testdriver3@example.com
Fill in the password field with TestPassword123!
Fill in the licence number field with LIC-67890
Fill in the plate number field with KKE-5678
Upload an unsupported file type as the passport photo
Submit the registration form
Verify an inline validation error is visible for the uploaded photo
